Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long LINC dominates today's output as the clear #1 ranked security with a score of 94.8, driven by extraordinary long-term momentum: 1,276% over 10 years, 485% over 5 years, and 153% over 1 year. The security shows textbook healthy acceleration across timeframes (each ratio above 1.2x), passes all moving average filters, trades at a +136 percentage point advantage versus SPY over 1 year, and carries a "strong_buy" signal with clean momentum and confirmed volatility. NYT ranks second with more moderate but still solid performance at 67% annualized return over 1 year and all SMA filters engaged, though it shows a concerning 5-year underperformance versus SPY (-6.41%) that contrasts sharply with its exceptional 10-year return of 544%. The data reveals a market favoring securities with sustained multi-decade outperformance and clean technical structure, with LINC's material correlations to cyclical sectors (XLB at 0.32, XLI at 0.28) suggesting sector-wide strength rather than isolated gains.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
